Two editable INPUT working copies are already created in Drive: 927 tree → "SRA-SRM Development" folder (id 1VVy5NR3LLknk555I6V0gEiXV3n2ghOlt). This task just wires them into the daily GitHub archive — same WD_ID re-point as T-0001. Built on the v0.2 SRA/SMS plan.

Doc IDs to register:

- HALO-SRM-001 (Safety Risk Management / hazard log + SMS) = 1y9jLe7n5KZzoGYoxQ5aoukVgCuPUb7PAJlft7-MlhQo

STEP 1 — Open the project on the PC:
  cd C:\Users\bradm\Claude\Projects\Dashboard

STEP 2 — Find where WORKING_DOC_IDS is defined (shared build.js / cron source):

STEP 4 — Deploy:
